text.data-narration: Data Security: The practice of protecting sensitive information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.
text.tspan: The practice of protecting sensitive information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.

text.data-narration: Data Privacy: The control over the personal information of individuals, ensuring that it is not misused or shared without consent.
text.tspan: The control over the personal information of individuals, ensuring that it is not misused or shared without consent.

text.data-narration: Insider Threats: Unauthorized access to data by an individual within an organization.
text.tspan: Unauthorized access to data by an individual within an organization.

text.data-narration: External Threats: Unauthorized access to data by an individual or entity outside the organization.
text.tspan: Unauthorized access to data by an individual or entity outside the organization.

text.data-narration: Physical Threats: Damage or destruction of data storage devices or facilities.
text.tspan: Damage or destruction of data storage devices or facilities.

text.data-narration: Malicious Threats: Use of malware or other malicious software to compromise data security.
text.tspan: Use of malware or other malicious software to compromise data security.

text.data-narration: Human Error Threats: Accidental or intentional errors that compromise data security.
text.tspan: Accidental or intentional errors that compromise data security.

text.data-narration: Authentication: Verifying the identity of users or systems.
text.tspan: Verifying the identity of users or systems.

text.data-narration: Authorization: Controlling access to sensitive information based on user identity and permissions.
text.tspan: Controlling access to sensitive information based on user identity and permissions.

text.data-narration: Encryption: Converting data into an unreadable format to protect it from unauthorized access.
text.tspan: Converting data into an unreadable format to protect it from unauthorized access.

text.data-narration: Access Control: Regulating access to data and systems based on user identity and permissions.
text.tspan: Regulating access to data and systems based on user identity and permissions.

text.data-narration: Backup and Recovery: Regularly backing up data and having a plan in place for disaster recovery.
text.tspan: Regularly backing up data and having a plan in place for disaster recovery.

text.data-narration: Data Privacy Laws and Regulations will be discussed in this section.
text.tspan: will be discussed in this section.
